title: 菊花賞の後に・アドバンス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide loses at the Kikuka Sho, but she
looks proud and satisfied to have put everything
on the line to win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the race, Narita Taishin and Winning Ticket
stop by to exchange compliments and
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next race is the spring Tenno Sho. There,
we'll have our rematch with Narita Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide vows to win it with a smile that is
much, much brighter than it has been recently.
